reviews.review_description: You are doing the same 3 movements over and over again, with no indications how long it will last. I did 5 sets and it still didn't end and there is no way to stop the run.

Never written a review before but this really deserves it. I've tried loads of the fitness apps and none of them really focus on bodyweight strength exercises. My favourite things about this app are:

it's small - takes up no space on drive
it's incredibly easy to use and settings are very adaptable to suit you
it's range of music options are simple and just fine
there's no learning curve
you can do the push ups from your knees instead of your feet if you want to reduce resistance
no need for any 'motivational' coaching or extra material, just turn on and exercise
the combination of squats punches and push ups covers most of your body with bodyweight exercises
pass through means I can just stick on the headset and start
tracking is excellent and hand motions very easy.

Room for improvement:

a few extra movements to cover back muscles, pulling motions like triceps, core (maybe bridges?) would be excellent additions
nothing else really - I love how stripped down and simple the app is, which makes it really quick and efficient to use. 

Very many thanks to the developer - just what I've been looking for for months now.
